nodes.name: Rhynchopsitta
nodes.summary: Rhynchopsitta（Rhynchopsitta）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如厚嘴鸚哥、Maroon-fronted parrot。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 厚嘴鸚哥
nodes.summary: 厚嘴鸚哥（thick-billed parrot，學名：Rhynchopsitta pachyrhyncha）是金剛鸚鵡科厚嘴鸚哥屬之下的兩個物種之一，另一個是暗紅喙鸚鵡。分佈於墨西哥的西馬德雷山脈。 厚嘴鸚哥目前在野外的數量大約1,700隻，被國際自然保護聯盟（IUCN）列為瀕危物種紅色名錄。在1980年代保育人士試圖將厚嘴鸚哥重新引進美國西南部，但在亞利桑那州的試驗結果不如預期。 參考
nodes.shortSummary: 厚嘴鸚哥（thick-billed parrot，學名：Rhynchopsitta pachyrhyncha）是金剛鸚鵡科厚嘴鸚哥屬之下的兩個物種之一，另一個是暗紅喙鸚鵡。分佈於墨西哥的西馬德雷山脈。 厚嘴鸚哥目前在野外的數量大約1,700隻，被國際自然保護聯盟（IUCN）列為…

nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Accounts in both Arizona and New Mexico indicate birds visiting regularly, as well as over-wintering in Arizona. However, these accounts co-occurred with heavy shooting, logging, and development that extirpated the thick-billed parrot from its US range. The disruption of Native American ways of life greatly decreased the range of some bird species (like the boreal owl) that utilized Native American irrigation and farm land, and it is possible that the thick-billed parrot also suffered from this effect of European colonization

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Principal threats to the thick-billed parrot are illegal pet trade, habitat loss principally due to logging, climate change (hotter temperatures that raise the snow line and increasing fire threats), and predators especially hawks and owls

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Principal threats to the thick-billed parrot are illegal pet trade, habitat loss principally due to logging, climate change (hotter temperatures that raise the snow line and increasing fire threats), and predators especially hawks and owls
